public_wording_boundary: Public copy says local AI tool integration; it does not expose hooks / MCP / REST as a user-facing capability matrix.

test_focus: install helper preserves existing hook groups
no project file write without explicit install action
real recall requires explicit agent call
source refs and raw boundaries survive compact responses
GET status and doctor endpoints are read-only
sensitive POST endpoints require local action token
source records and raw mirrors are checked before memory trust
canonical index is derivative, not raw origin
lost source and lost raw stay visible
doctor shows whether records are guarded
timeline renders source -> raw -> canonical index -> memory/experience
session replay is presented as record chain, not a memory wall
